skill.name: qwen-image
skill.description: Generate and edit images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0 models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Qwen-Image-2.0 (fast), Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro (professional text rendering). Capabilities: text-to-image, multi-image editing, complex text rendering. Triggers: qwen image, qwen-image, alibaba image, dashscope image, qwen image 2, qwen image pro
skill.summary: Generate and edit images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0 models via inference.sh CLI
skill.author: toolshell

security_audit.summary: This skill is a documentation file (SKILL.md) that provides guidance on using the inference.sh CLI for Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0 image generation. All static findings (external_commands, network, weak cryptographic algorithm, system reconnaissance) are false positives. The skill contains only markdown documentation with example commands - no executable code. The backticks detected are markdown code block syntax, not shell execution. Network URLs are legitimate documentation links.

low_findings.title: External Commands in Documentation
low_findings.description: The skill contains example CLI commands using infsh tool. These are documentation examples, not executable code. The skill is a SKILL.md file that provides usage instructions.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Static analyzer misinterprets markdown code blocks as shell execution. The skill is documentation-only with no executable code.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs in Documentation
low_findings.description: Documentation contains URLs to inference.sh website and example image URLs. These are legitimate documentation links.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs in documentation are expected and serve as reference links for users.

content.value_statement: Create stunning images from text prompts using Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0 models. Supports text-to-image generation, multi-image editing, and professional text rendering for posters and designs.
actual_capabilities: Generate images from text prompts using Qwen-Image-2.0 model
Create images with professional text rendering using Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model
Edit images using multiple reference images (1-3 images)
Control output with custom resolution, negative prompts, and seeds
Generate multiple images (1-6) in a single request
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI (infsh) to be installed
Requires inference.sh account with API access
Image resolution must be between 512x512 and 2048x2048 pixels

use_cases.title: Quick Image Generation
use_cases.description: Generate simple images from text prompts for prototyping or content creation
use_cases.target_user: Developers and content creators needing quick image generation

use_cases.title: Text-Heavy Designs
use_cases.description: Create posters, banners, and marketing materials with professional text rendering
use_cases.target_user: Marketing teams and designers creating promotional materials

use_cases.title: Image Editing
use_cases.description: Edit existing images by combining elements from multiple reference images

prompt_templates.title: Basic Image Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image of {describe your scene} using Qwen-Image-2.0
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need a simple image from a text description

prompt_templates.title: Multiple Images
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate {number} images of {describe your prompt} using Qwen-Image-2.0
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need variations of the same concept

prompt_templates.title: Custom Resolution
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a {width}x{height} image of {describe your scene} using Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need specific dimensions for your project

prompt_templates.title: Text-Heavy Poster
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a poster with the title "{title}" in {color} {font_style} at the {position}. Background: {describe background}. Use Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro.
prompt_templates.scenario: When creating marketing materials with specific text requirements

output_examples.input: Generate an image of a serene mountain landscape at sunset
output_examples.output: The skill returns a PNG image file with the generated mountain landscape at sunset, along with metadata including dimensions and generation parameters used.

output_examples.input: Create a poster with title 'Summer Sale!' in bold red text
output_examples.output: The Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model generates a poster with 'Summer Sale!' rendered in bold red text at the top, with a beach background and palm trees.

best_practices: Use Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro for text-heavy designs as it has professional text rendering
Set prompt_extend to false when you need precise control over the output
Use the seed parameter when you need reproducible results
anti_patterns: Do not include personal or sensitive information in prompts
Avoid generating images that may violate content policies
Do not use extremely long prompts beyond 800 characters

faq.question: What is inference.sh?
faq.answer: inference.sh is a platform that provides CLI access to various AI models including Qwen-Image-2.0. You need to install the infsh CLI and create an account to use this skill.

faq.question: Which model should I use?
faq.answer: Use Qwen-Image-2.0 for fast general image generation. Use Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro when you need professional text rendering in your images.

faq.question: How do I install the required CLI?
faq.answer: Run: npx skills add inference-sh/skills@agent-tools to get the inference.sh CLI (infsh). Then run infsh login to authenticate.

faq.question: Can I edit existing images?
faq.answer: Yes, you can use the reference_images parameter to provide 1-3 input images for editing or combining elements.

faq.question: How do I get reproducible results?
faq.answer: Use the seed parameter with a specific number (0-2147483647) to get the same result for the same prompt.

faq.question: What resolution can I use?
faq.answer: You can set custom resolution between 512x512 and 2048x2048 pixels. The total pixel count must be within this range.
